retry_reason: The atomic decrement always succeeds; no failure path exists for the reference count operation. If refcount was already zero, it indicates a use-after-free bug, not a retry scenario.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for struct bpf_prog. It decrements the reference count via atomic64_dec_and_test on aux->refcnt. When the count reaches zero, it triggers cleanup via bpf_prog_put_deferred. If called in atomic context (hardirq or irqs disabled), it defers cleanup using schedule_work; otherwise, it performs cleanup directly. After this call, the caller must not access the bpf_prog object, as it may be freed asynchronously. The function does not return a value and always succeeds under correct usage (caller must hold a valid reference).
